summary.goal: Translate raw Equip sheet codes into player-friendly slots and weapon classes.
currentUnderstanding: The website imports item names, stats, stat increments, and crafting requirements from the Equip tab.
The website does not yet fully decode raw sheet category/type codes into final equipment slots automatically.
Current slot assignments and weapon types are stored separately in live shared JSON after human-guided mapping.

openQuestions: Does category map directly to top-level slot families such as weapon, shield, and accessory?
Does type map to weapon subtypes or to broader visual/equip classes?
Which raw combinations correspond to Head, Armor, and Accessory consistently?
